message: This is the place in question.
Baked Apple Inc. is such a cute building.
Don't be impressed. You see, we’re basically going in for a raid. Put on a more serious face!
Isn't that a bit over the top?
This is very important to me.
Don't joke around, can you take it more seriously?
So, as I was saying, if this keeps up,
I’ll have to file a defamation lawsuit.
Aren't you tired? You're putting too much effort into this.
Can you please listen a little more seriously?
Hey! That guy over there is a nice guy. Wouldn't you want him as a men's model for our magazine?
And your butt's perfectly toned, it's amazing.
You’d make a fine nude model.
!? No way, I’m not confident enough.
Jake, don’t get involved in that!
Guy’s ex-fiancée, I have no interest in you. Please go home.
It's rude to say 'ex'—I'm still his fiancée.
Didn’t you see the article? You and Guy should be broken off the engagement.
As I’ve said multiple times, that’s just a rumor. It’s defamation dressed up as an article!
That's exactly why a hysterical woman like you gets dumped.
It’s about Guy after all, Kristy needs to stay calm.
Because this woman calls me you!
I call everyone you. Plus, Guy himself isn’t saying anything about it.
Yeah, he’s just ignoring the rumors.
Anyway, if the person involved isn’t saying anything, others have no right to talk.
Guy is busy, so he can’t deal with this kind of thing.
Yeah, Guy has never cared about this kind of stuff.
I don’t know if he’s always been like that, but this is reliable information from a source.
Don’t lie to me! There’s no way something so ridiculous could be true.
I don’t know where you got your info, but that reliable source is unreliable. Guy and Kristy are a loving couple.
Exactly. What you’re doing is defamation.
Speaking of which, you’re the daughter of the president of a major bank, aren't you? It must be tough for you.
You’ve even looked into my background?! What a nasty person!!
Is there really a need to look into an ordinary person like Kristy?
Because if you only look into Guy, it’s one-sided, right? As a reporter, you should look at everything.
I’ll say it again, that article is based on reliable information. Go ahead and file a lawsuit if you want. But don’t hold a grudge if you lose.
Wait, we could lose? Th-That can’t be!
There’s no way that could be true!
See, you can't argue back because you know it’s true. And yet, you made it this far, huh?
